---
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css: 
      - default-page
      - default
      - ../shared/html/guide.css
 

params:
  table_path: "plantpestguide_content.csv"

  # user-defined
  unit: "KLMN"
  group_col: "Observed pest on"

  # expected columns
  pest_col: "PEST"
  latin_col: "LATIN_FULL"
  symptom_col: "SYMPTOM"
  hosts_all_col: "HOSTS_ALL"
  description_col: "DESCRIPTION"
  png_col: "PNG"
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

unit <- params$unit
group_col <- params$group_col
host_col <- paste0(unit, "_knownhosts")

pests_raw <- read.csv(params$table_path)
names(pests_raw) <- trimws(names(pests_raw))

pests <- pests_raw %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(as.character(.data[[host_col]]), "[A-Za-z]"))
```

```{r debug, echo=FALSE, eval=F}
# 
params
unit
group_col
host_col
names(pests_raw)
nrow(pests_raw)
nrow(pests)
table(pests[[group_col]], useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r include=FALSE}

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
library(knitr)

unit <- params$unit
group_col <- params$group_col

host_col <- paste0(unit, "_knownhosts")

pests_raw <- read.csv(
  params$table_path
)
# spaces in colnames get converted weird and I'm sick of elegance so this is my hammer
names(pests_raw) <- trimws(names(pests_raw))
names(pests_raw) <- gsub("\ufeff", "", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE)
names(pests_raw) <- gsub(".", " ", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE)  

required_cols <- c(
  params$pest_col,
  params$latin_col,
  params$symptom_col,
  params$hosts_all_col,
  params$description_col,
  params$png_col,
  group_col,
  host_col
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(pests_raw))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required column(s): ",
    paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

pests <- pests_raw %>%
  mutate(
    .known_hosts = as.character(.data[[host_col]]),
    .group = as.character(.data[[group_col]])
  ) %>%
  filter(str_detect(.known_hosts, "[A-Za-z]")) %>%
  arrange(.group, .data[[params$pest_col]])

groups <- split(pests, pests$.group)

```


```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* {=css, echo=F} for quarto/qmd */


body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 11pt;
}

/*
.group-heading {
  font-size: 18pt;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin: 0 0 0.25in 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #999;
}
*/


.pest-header {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-bottom: 0.1in;
  margin-top: 0.1in;
}

.pest-header tr,
.pest-header th,
.pest-header td {
  border: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

.pest-header-a {
  width: 30%;
  text-align: left;
}

.pest-header-b {
  width: 70%;
  text-align: right !important;
}

.pest-card {
  min-height: 4.5in;
  margin-bottom: 0.05in;
  break-inside: avoid;
  page-break-inside: avoid;
}

.guide-page {
  break-after: page;
  page-break-after: always;
}

.guide-page:last-child {
  break-after: auto;
  page-break-after: auto;
}

.group-string {
  string-set: group content(text);
  font-size: 1px;
  line-height: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  color: transparent;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.pest-name {
  font-size: 12pt;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.latin {
  font-size: 11pt;
  font-style: italic;
  margin-top: 0.08in;
}

.symptom {
  margin-top: 0.1in;
}

.pest-image {
  width: 100%;
  height: 3.0in;
  object-fit: contain;
  border: 1px solid #6aa84f;
  margin-top: 0.15in;
}

.description {
  font-size: 9pt;
  margin-top: 0.1in;
}

```



```{r render, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
group_names <- names(groups)

for (g in seq_along(group_names)) {

  group_name <- group_names[[g]]
  group_df <- groups[[group_name]]
  card_count <- 0

  cat(glue::glue("
<div class='group-string'>{group_col}: {group_name}</div>
"))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(group_df))) {

    row <- group_df[i, ]

    pest <- row[[params$pest_col]]
    latin <- row[[params$latin_col]]
    symptom <- row[[params$symptom_col]]
    known_hosts <- row[[host_col]]
    all_hosts <- row[[params$hosts_all_col]]
    description <- row[[params$description_col]]
    png_path <- row[[params$png_col]]

    if (is.na(latin) || trimws(latin) == "") latin <- "&nbsp;"

    cat(glue::glue("
<div class='pest-card'>

<table class='pest-header'>
  <tr>
    <td class='pest-header-a pest-name'>{pest}</td>
    <td class='pest-header-b known-hosts'>known {unit} hosts: {known_hosts}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class='pest-header-a latin'><em>{latin}</em></td>
    <td class='pest-header-b all-hosts'>all hosts: {all_hosts}</td>
  </tr>
</table>

<div class='symptom'>{symptom}</div>
<img class='pest-image' src='{png_path}'>
<div class='description'>{description}</div>

</div>
"))

    card_count <- card_count + 1

    if (card_count %% 2 == 0 && i < nrow(group_df)) {
      cat("<div class='page-break'></div>")
    }
  }

  if (g < length(group_names)) {
    cat("<div class='page-break'></div>")
  }
}

```
